base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_book_of_magic — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Magic Book — upgrades Magical Rod to shoot fire-trail. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
